meaning: n.评价者,价格核定人,森林地估测者
examples: The valuer put the value of the stock at$25,000.
They sent a valuer to assess the value of the house.
Why do you valuer your failures more then your success?
Any applications for a reduction in valuation received by the district valuer will be considered.
He specialised in rugs, carpets and antiques, while she was a general valuer with the company.
